_meta.note: Py-GC-MS single-charge ions. No deconvolution needed. v2.0: added SMILES, charge, radical, start/end group fields.

chain_structure.oligomer_note: PS thermal depolymerization produces mainly monomer (n=1), dimer (n=2), trimer (n=3). Trimer absent in this sample.

fragments.name: C3H3+
fragments.description: Propargyl cation — small alkyne fragment from vinyl chain cracking

fragments.name: C4H3+
fragments.description: Butadiynyl cation — C4 alkyne fragment

fragments.name: C4H5+
fragments.description: Methylenecyclopropyl or butadienyl cation — C4 aliphatic fragment

fragments.name: C5H5+
fragments.description: Cyclopentadienyl cation — 5-membered ring, aromatic 6pi, from phenyl ring opening

fragments.name: C6H5+
fragments.description: Phenyl cation — 6-membered aromatic ring, signature PS fragment (beta-cleavage of vinyl-phenyl bond)

fragments.name: C6H6+.
fragments.description: Benzene radical cation M+. — rearrangement product of PS phenyl groups

fragments.name: C7H5+
fragments.description: Phenylacetylene fragment cation — acetylenic C7 from vinyl+phenyl

fragments.name: C7H7+
fragments.description: Tropylium cation — 7-membered aromatic ring (6pi), thermodynamically very stable. #1 PS signature ion. From phenyl + CH2 rearrangement.

fragments.name: C7H8+.
fragments.description: Toluene radical cation M+. — methyl-phenyl rearrangement, common PS fragment

fragments.name: C8H7+
fragments.description: Styryl cation — PS monomer unit minus H. Chain head fragment with vinyl terminus.

fragments.name: C8H8+.
fragments.description: Styrene monomer M+. — #2 PS signature ion. PS repeat unit (DP=1). Vinyl+phenyl structure. Base peak in PS pyrolysis.

fragments.name: C8H9+
fragments.description: Protonated styrene [M+H]+ or ethylbenzene fragment

fragments.name: C9H7+
fragments.description: Indenyl cation — bicyclic C9 fragment from styrene cyclization

fragments.name: C9H8+.
fragments.description: Indene radical cation — bicyclic aromatic, styrene + CH2 cyclization

fragments.name: C9H9+
fragments.description: Methylstyryl cation — alpha-methylstyrene related

fragments.name: C9H10+.
fragments.description: Indane radical cation — saturated bicyclic from PS chain cyclization

fragments.name: C10H7+
fragments.description: Naphthyl cation — 2-ring PAH, from PS aromatization

fragments.name: C10H8+.
fragments.description: Naphthalene radical cation M+. — #3 PS signature ion. 2-ring PAH from condensation of phenyl groups. Peak at 400-460C.

fragments.name: C10H9+
fragments.description: Naphthyl + H — dihydronaphthalenyl or methylindenyl

fragments.name: C10H10+.
fragments.description: Methylindene radical cation

fragments.name: C11H9+
fragments.description: Methylnaphthalenyl cation — naphthyl + CH2

fragments.name: C11H10+.
fragments.description: 1-Methylnaphthalene radical cation — from PS + CH2 condensation

fragments.name: C11H11+
fragments.description: Methylnaphthalenyl + H

fragments.name: C12H7+
fragments.description: Acenaphthylenyl cation — 3-ring fused PAH fragment

fragments.name: C12H8+.
fragments.description: Acenaphthylene M+. — 3-ring fused PAH, PS high-T pyrolysis product (>480C)

fragments.name: C12H9+
fragments.description: Acenaphthyl cation

fragments.name: C12H10+.
fragments.description: Biphenyl radical cation M+. or acenaphthene — two phenyl rings connected

fragments.name: C13H9+
fragments.description: Fluorenyl cation — tricyclic PAH fragment

fragments.name: C13H10+.
fragments.description: Fluorene M+. — tricyclic PAH

fragments.name: C14H9+
fragments.description: Anthracenyl/phenanthryl cation — 3-ring linear PAH

fragments.name: C14H10+.
fragments.description: Anthracene/Phenanthrene M+. — 3-ring PAH, PS pyrolysis >400C. Strong PS marker.

fragments.name: C15H11+
fragments.description: Methylanthracenyl cation

fragments.name: C15H12+.
fragments.description: Methylanthracene M+.

fragments.name: C15H13+
fragments.description: Dimer fragment — diphenylmethyl type, PS chain DP=2 related

fragments.name: PS_dimer_frag
fragments.description: PS dimer C1-fragment M+. — diphenylethane, characteristic PS dimer breakdown

fragments.name: C16H9+
fragments.description: Pyrenyl cation — 4-ring compact PAH

fragments.name: C16H10+.
fragments.description: Pyrene/Fluoranthene M+. — 4-ring PAH, PS pyrolysis >450C PAH zone

fragments.name: C16H12+.
fragments.description: trans-Stilbene M+. or methylpyrene — two phenyl rings with vinyl bridge (PS chain coupling product)

fragments.name: PS_dimer
fragments.description: PS dimer M+. (DP=2) — two styrene units, 1,3-diphenyl-1-butene type. H-head, H-tail. Neutral mass=208.125 Da.

fragments.name: PS_dimer_Na
fragments.description: PS dimer [M+Na]+ — sodium adduct of DP=2 neutral (C16H16 neutral 208.125 + Na 22.989 = 231.1144). Corrected from erroneous 230.107.

fragments.name: C17H11+
fragments.description: Benzofluorenyl cation — 4-ring PAH

fragments.name: C17H12+.
fragments.description: Benzofluorene M+. — 4-ring PAH

fragments.name: C18H10+.
fragments.description: Cyclopenta[cd]pyrene or acepyrylene M+. — high-T PAH

fragments.name: C18H12+.
fragments.description: Chrysene/Triphenylene M+. — 4-ring PAH, PS char zone

fragments.name: PS_trimer
fragments.description: PS trimer M+. (DP=3) — three styrene units. Neutral mass=312.188 Da. ABSENT in this sample (305-320 Da range empty).

fragments.name: PS_trimer_H
fragments.description: PS trimer [M+H]+ — protonated DP=3 oligomer. Ion formula C24H25, neutral C24H24 (M=312.188 Da). Charge from protonation.

fragments.name: PS_trimer_Na
fragments.description: PS trimer [M+Na]+ — sodium adduct of DP=3 (neutral mass 312.188 + 22.989 = 335.177; ~0.007 Da obs vs calc OK within EI tolerance).

fragments.name: PS_trimer_K
fragments.description: PS trimer [M+K]+ — potassium adduct of DP=3 (neutral 312.188 + 38.963 = 351.151; obs 351.144 ~0.007 Da OK).

fragments.name: C8H7+_vinyl
fragments.description: Vinylbenzene (styrene) fragment cation — same formula as styryl

fragments.name: C10H11+
fragments.description: Methylindanyl cation — saturated bicyclic C10

fragments.name: C10H12+.
fragments.description: Methylindane radical cation

fragments.name: C8H6+.
fragments.description: Phenylacetylene M+. — styrene minus H2 (dehydrogenation product)

fragments.name: C14H11+
fragments.description: Dihydroanthracenyl or methylphenanthryl cation

fragments.name: C14H12+.
fragments.description: Dihydroanthracene/Stilbene M+.

fragments.name: C15H11+_pyrol
fragments.description: Methylphenanthryl cation

fragments.name: C16H9+_pyrol
fragments.description: Cyclopentapyrenyl cation C16H9+ — 4-ring compact PAH fragment. Corrected mz from 205.065→201.070 (C16H9 exact mass).

fragments.name: C16H11+
fragments.description: Fluoranthenyl cation — 4-ring non-linear PAH

fragments.name: C16H11+_pyr
fragments.description: Methylpyrene fragment cation C16H11+ — correct mz 203.086 (C16H11 exact). Corrected from erroneous 207.081.

fragments.name: C11H8+.
fragments.description: Azulene or methylnaphthalene M+. — C11 bicyclic aromatic

fragments.name: C12H11+
fragments.description: Biphenylyl cation — two phenyl rings

fragments.name: C12H10+_bp
fragments.description: Biphenyl M+. — two connected phenyl rings, PS chain coupling product

fragments.name: C13H8+.
fragments.description: Fluorene minus H2 — dehydrogenation product

fragments.name: C17H13+
fragments.description: Methylfluoranthenyl cation

fragments.name: C18H11+
fragments.description: Benzopyrenyl cation — 5-ring PAH fragment

fragments.name: C17H14+.
fragments.description: Methylfluoranthene M+.

fragments.name: C19H12+.
fragments.description: Benzopyrene fragment M+. — 5-ring PAH, PS char zone >500C

fragments.name: C18H14+.
fragments.description: Dihydrochrysene or terphenyl M+.

fragments.name: PS_dimer_plus2
fragments.description: PS dimer + 2H M+. — 1,3-diphenylbutane, fully saturated dimer

fragments.name: C6H4+.
fragments.description: Benzyne/ortho-dehydrobenzene M+. — very reactive intermediate

fragments.name: C7H6+.
fragments.description: Fulvene or methylenecyclopentadiene M+. — tropylium related

fragments.name: C3H3_allyl
fragments.description: Allyl cation — aliphatic C3 fragment, chain backbone cracking

fragments.name: C5H4+.
fragments.description: Cyclopentadiene M+. — 5-ring non-aromatic, phenyl ring partial reduction

fragments.name: C11H7+
fragments.description: Naphthylacetylene fragment cation

fragments.name: C10H7CH2+
fragments.description: Naphthylmethyl cation — benzyl analog with naphthalene

fragments.name: C15H10+.
fragments.description: Phenanthrene M+. — 3-ring angular PAH

fragments.name: C13H9+_fluor
fragments.description: Fluorenyl cation (alternative structure)

fragments.name: C19H14+.
fragments.description: Methylchrysene M+. — 4-ring PAH with methyl substituent

end_group.description: -CN nitrile end group from chain termination

chain_structure.oligomer_note: PAN thermal cyclization produces ladder polymer above 300C. Main fragments: HCN, acrylonitrile, pyridine, benzonitrile (cyclization products).

fragments.name: HCN+.
fragments.description: Hydrogen cyanide M+. — most abundant PAN fragment. From -CN side chain elimination. EI base peak.

fragments.name: C2H3N+.
fragments.description: Acetonitrile M+. — methyl nitrile, from chain beta-scission + nitrile

fragments.name: C3H3N+.
fragments.description: Acrylonitrile M+. — PAN monomer (DP=1). Vinyl+nitrile structure. #1 PAN signature ion.

fragments.name: C4H5N+.
fragments.description: Methacrylonitrile M+. — methyl-substituted acrylonitrile

fragments.name: C4H4N+
fragments.description: Methylenepyrrole or cyanoallyl cation — PAN cyclization intermediate

fragments.name: C5H5N+.
fragments.description: Pyridine M+. — 6-membered N-aromatic ring. PAN thermal cyclization product (300-400C ladder polymerization). Key PAN marker.

fragments.name: C5H7N+.
fragments.description: Methylpyrrole M+. — 5-membered N-heterocycle, PAN cyclization product

fragments.name: C6H5N+.
fragments.description: Aniline M+. (aminobenzene C6H7N, MW=93.058) — PAN + reduction product. Corrected mz from 79.042 (pyridine overlap error) → 93.058.

fragments.name: C6H7N+.
fragments.description: Methylpyridine M+. — PAN cyclization + methylation

fragments.name: C7H5N+.
fragments.description: Benzonitrile M+. — phenyl + nitrile, PAN aromatization product. Major PAN marker at high T.

fragments.name: C8H7N+.
fragments.description: Methylbenzonitrile or indole M+. — PAN extended cyclization

fragments.name: PAN_dimer
fragments.description: PAN dimer fragment M+. — glutaronitrile type (DP=2 backbone). Two nitrile groups.

fragments.name: PAN_trimer
fragments.description: PAN trimer fragment M+. — trinitrile (DP=3 backbone). Three repeat units with nitrile end groups.

ADDITIVES.name: Automotive Polymer Additives
ADDITIVES._note: Otomotiv grade PS/ABS/PP icin tipik katki maddeleri. Mitsubishi/Toyota OEM.

categories.HALS: Hindered Amine Light Stabilizer — UV/isi kararliligi

fragments.name: HALS_frag1
fragments.description: HALS piperidyl fragment — hindered piperidine ring C16H23N3. Detected at 160C (early evaporation) and 480C (polymer-bound release). Dual peak = two compound populations.

fragments.name: HALS_frag2
fragments.description: Larger HALS piperidyl fragment C18H27N3 — propyl-substituted hindered amine.

fragments.name: UV_BZT_frag
fragments.description: Benzotriazole UV absorber fragment — hydroxyphenyl-benzotriazole type. Absorbs UV 300-380 nm.

fragments.name: UV_BZT_297
fragments.description: Large aromatic benzotriazole fragment C20H13N2O — highly aromatic (DBE=14). Late pyrolysis peak at 430C.

fragments.name: BHT
fragments.description: BHT (butylated hydroxytoluene) M+. — phenolic antioxidant. Hindered phenol, two tert-butyl groups flanking OH. Very common PS additive.

fragments.name: BHT_frag1
fragments.description: BHT minus methyl group [M-15]+ — tert-butyl loses CH3, common EI fragmentation pathway.

fragments.name: Irganox1076_frag
fragments.description: Irganox 1076 hindered phenol fragment C18H27O — ester antioxidant phenolic fragment after C-O ester cleavage. Corrected formula from C17H27O→C18H27O (exact mass 259.206).

fragments.name: Irgafos168_frag
fragments.description: Irgafos 168 phosphite antioxidant fragment C18H21O2 — triphenyl phosphite related fragment after P-O cleavage. Corrected mz from 277.154→269.154 (C18H21O2 exact mass).

fragments.name: TBBPA_frag
fragments.compound: TBBPA — Tetrabromobisphenol A fragmenti (Br izotop pattern!)
fragments.description: TBBPA (tetrabromobisphenol A) fragment C10H12Br2 — bisphenol core fragment retaining 2 Br atoms. Corrected formula/mz (C10H12Br2 exact=289.930). 4-Br M+. ~543.9 Da full molecule.

fragments.name: DBDPE_frag
fragments.description: DBDPE fragment (tribromophenyl-propyl type) C9H13Br3 — from decabromodiphenylethane retrosynthesis. Corrected formula/mz (C9H13Br3 exact=357.857). Multiple Br isotope pattern characteristic.

fragments.name: Slip_erucamide
fragments.description: Erucamide (C22:1 fatty amide) M+. — long-chain unsaturated amide slip agent. Early evaporation at 120C. cis double bond at C13.

fragments.name: Slip_oleamide
fragments.description: Oleamide (C18:1 fatty amide) M+. — shorter-chain slip agent. Very early evaporation at 110C.

BACKGROUND.name: Background / System Contaminants
BACKGROUND._note: Enstruman arka planından veya numune hazirliginda gelen sistemik sinyaller. Numune-kaynakli deyil. Bos run ile dogrulanmali.

categories.PHTHALATE: Phthalate ester — plastiklestirici background kontaminasyonu (septum, boru, kap vb.)

fragments.name: Phthalate_149
fragments.description: Phthalate acylium ion [C8H5O3]+ — universal phthalate base peak. Formed from DEHP/DBP/DOP by McLafferty-type rearrangement. Flat thermogram = continuous instrumental source.
fragments.compound: Phthalate acylium ion [C6H4(CO)(CO2H)]+ — DEHP/DBP/DOP ortak baz piki (m/z 149). Duz termogram (60-350C), alet arka plani veya numune kabindan sizdirma. Blank run ile dogrulanmali.
fragments.note: M+2/M=0.52% (kucuk) — kucuk kume sayisi; S yok. Phthalic anhydride M+. 148 Da da goruluyor. m/z 76 (C6H4O+) zayif ama mevcut.
fragments.ref: NIST #117565 (phthalic anhydride); EPA Method 8270; Bu analiz block_010 exact_mz=148.9935

fragments.name: Phthalate_76
fragments.description: Phthalate marker fragment C6H4+ (m/z 76.031) — ortho-benzyne/phenylene ion, phthalic anhydride and phthalate ester cofragment. Corrected formula C6H4O→C6H4 and mz 76.039→76.031.
fragments.compound: Phthalate marker fragment C6H4O+ (m/z 76) — phthalic anhydride ve phthalate ester ortak fragmenti
fragments.ref: NIST #117565; Bu analiz block_010 mz=76.014 intensity=1.33e4

fragments.name: Phthalate_148
fragments.description: Phthalic anhydride M+. (C8H4O3) — cyclic anhydride radical cation. Cofragment confirming phthalate contamination.
fragments.compound: Phthalic anhydride M+. (C8H4O3, MW=148.016) — phthalate ester in-source fragmenti veya kontaminasyon
fragments.ref: NIST #117565; Bu analiz block_010 mz=148.008 intensity=8.04e6

fragments.name: ColumnBleed_D4
fragments.description: PDMS D4 cyclic tetramer loss-of-CH3 fragment [M-CH3]+ — [(CH3)2SiO]4 minus CH3 (EI McLafferty-type). Ion formula C7H21O4Si4 (exact 281.052). Full D4 M+=296.075. Corrected from D4 neutral formula.
fragments.compound: Polydimethylsiloxane (PDMS) D4 kolon kanama — m/z 281. GC kolon degradasyonu.

fragments.name: ColumnBleed_D5
fragments.description: PDMS D5 cyclic pentamer loss-of-CH3 fragment [M-CH3]+ — [(CH3)2SiO]5 minus CH3. Ion formula C9H27O5Si5 (exact 355.070). Corrected from D5 neutral formula.

chain_structure.oligomer_note: PMMA APGC depolimerizasyonu: MMA monomer + dimer + trimer. Adduct: [M+H]+, [M+NH4]+, [M+Na]+ karışık.

fragments.name: MMA monomer [M+H]+
fragments.description: MMA monomer protonated [M+H]+ — PMMA APGC baskın fragmenti

fragments.name: MMA monomer [M+NH4]+
fragments.description: MMA monomer ammonium adduct [M+NH4]+

fragments.name: MMA monomer [M+Na]+
fragments.description: MMA monomer sodium adduct [M+Na]+

fragments.name: methacrylate fragment [M+H]+
fragments.description: Methacrylate ester parçalanma fragmenti — MMA'dan ester kaybı

fragments.name: PMMA dimer [M+NH4]+
fragments.description: PMMA dimer ammonium adduct — n=2 oligomer

fragments.name: PMMA dimer [M+Na]+
fragments.description: PMMA dimer sodium adduct — n=2 oligomer

fragments.name: PMMA trimer [M+NH4]+
fragments.description: PMMA trimer ammonium adduct — n=3 oligomer

fragments.name: PMMA trimer [M+Na]+
fragments.description: PMMA trimer sodium adduct — n=3 oligomer

fragments.name: PMMA tetramer [M+NH4]+
fragments.description: PMMA tetramer ammonium adduct — n=4 oligomer

fragments.name: PMMA tetramer [M+Na]+
fragments.description: PMMA tetramer sodium adduct — n=4 oligomer

chain_structure.oligomer_note: PEG oligomer series observed as [M+H]+ / [M+Na]+ under APGC soft ionization.

fragments.name: EG monomer [M+H]+
fragments.description: Ethylene glycol protonated [M+H]+; base repeat marker for PEG.
fragments.ref: Lattimer J.Anal.Appl.Pyr 2000; Wesdemiotis Mass Spec Rev 2011

fragments.name: PEG dimer [M+H]+
fragments.description: Diethylene glycol protonated [M+H]+; PEG n=2 oligomer.

fragments.name: PEG dimer [M+Na]+
fragments.description: Diethylene glycol sodium adduct [M+Na]+; PEG n=2 oligomer.

fragments.name: PEG trimer [M+Na]+
fragments.description: Triethylene glycol sodium adduct [M+Na]+; PEG n=3 oligomer.

fragments.name: PEG repeat fragment
fragments.description: C2H5O+ ethylene oxide repeat unit cation; characteristic PEG low-mass marker.

fragments.name: PEG fragment 89
fragments.description: C4H9O2+ diethylene glycol dehydration fragment; PEG characteristic ion.
fragments.ref: Lattimer J.Anal.Appl.Pyr 2000; Wesdemiotis Mass Spec Rev 2011

chain_structure.oligomer_note: PE thermal cracking produces alkane/alkene homologous series (Δm=14). EI 70eV radical cation ionization.

fragments.name: C3H5+ (allyl)
fragments.description: Allyl cation C3H5+ — PE backbone chain marker, dominant low-mass PE ion.

fragments.name: C3H7+ (propyl)
fragments.description: Propyl cation C3H7+ — PE saturated fragment, Δm=14 alkane series member.

fragments.name: C4H7+ (butenyl)
fragments.description: Butenyl cation C4H7+ — alkene series member, PE characteristic ion.

fragments.name: C4H9+ (butyl)
fragments.description: Butyl cation C4H9+ — PE saturated fragment, Δm=14 series.

fragments.name: C5H9+ (pentenyl)
fragments.description: Pentenyl cation C5H9+ — alkene series, PE diagnostic ion.

fragments.name: C5H11+ (pentyl)
fragments.description: Pentyl cation C5H11+ — PE saturated fragment.

fragments.name: C6H11+ (hexenyl)
fragments.description: Hexenyl cation C6H11+ — alkene series, PE backbone marker.

fragments.name: C6H13+ (hexyl)
fragments.description: Hexyl cation C6H13+ — PE saturated fragment, higher series member.

fragments.name: C7H13+ (heptenyl)
fragments.description: Heptenyl cation C7H13+ — PE alkene series continuation.

fragments.name: C7H15+ (heptyl)
fragments.description: Heptyl cation C7H15+ — PE saturated higher fragment.
